description: loop-testing mechanism-layer hooks (Claude Code enhancement; the QA loop also runs on prompt discipline alone). Stop: while docs/looptesting/.active exists, block session stop until STATE.md status is terminal (CONVERGED/INCOMPLETE/BLOCKED); RUNNING or unparseable fails closed. Hard ceiling MAX_BLOCKS=3 (< platform's 8) so the gate never deadlocks; escape hatch LOOP_TESTING_DISABLE_STOP_GATE=1. PreToolUse: deny writes that stamp VERIFIED onto an ISSUE with no replay record in runs/round-*.md (cheat-cost raiser, not a hard gate); escape hatch LOOP_TESTING_DISABLE_LEDGER_GATE=1. NOTE: if plugin hooks.json auto-loading does not fire in your Claude Code version, register these hooks manually in settings.json — see README.
